title: SOSINYA 80 Colours Dual Tip Art Markers Set, Felt Tip Pens for Adults, Permanent Alcohol Marker Pens for Drawing,Sketching,Anime,Manga with Carrying Case and Storage Base
features: Aquamarker - A Unique Dual-Tip Marvel: Discover the versatility of alcohol markers with two tip options; a fine tip (1 mm) for sharp, precise lines, and a broad tip (6 mm) for even, flat colours. Tailored to meet all your artistic endeavours with precision and flair.

Rapid-Dry Alcohol Ink: Experience vibrancy and depth with our fast-drying ink that enhances the professional feel of your artwork. It allows for seamless blending of layers and hues. Furthermore, say goodbye to stains on clothes, skin, or hands while painting. With its thoughtful design, this splendid marker set travels with you anywhere, inspiring creativity on-the-go.

Innovative and Versatile Twinmarkers: Designed to be the world's most groundbreaking and adaptable markers, these alcohol pens are perfect for embellishing clothing, bags, and footwear. Customize coasters, Christmas baubles, colourful markers, glasses, photo albums, and craft projects to create unique gifts for friends and family.

Premium Quality Material: Crafted from highly pigmented acrylic paint, these alcohol markers utilise brilliant, water-based paint that dries quickly to achieve a durable, matte, and glossy finish on both light and dark surfaces.

Ink Penetration: Our ink formula has been refined multiple times to minimize leakage. When painting, we recommend placing a piece of paper beneath your work to prevent bleed-through. Adequate ink application can extend the pen's lifespan, ensuring your art lasts as long as your inspiration does.
